# blastshield_policy (Resource)

Manages a Blastshield policy.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "blastshield_policy" "allow_web" {
  name        = "allow-web-traffic"
  enabled     = true
  log         = true
  from_groups = [blastshield_group.web_servers.id]
  to_groups   = [blastshield_group.web_servers.id]
  services    = [blastshield_service.https.id]

  tags = {
    environment = "production"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `from_groups` (Set of Number)
- `log` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `services` (Set of Number)
- `to_groups` (Set of Number)

### Optional

- `tags` (Map of String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `system_tags` (Map of String)
